productDisplayName: Vans Women E-Street Grey Casual Shoes
description: A lightweight casual shoe from vans in neutral grey &ndash great for every day wear. This shoe ticks all the boxes &ndash practical, stylish and also ecologically friendly. The uppers of this Vans casual shoe are made of hemp &ndash similar in feel to cotton canvas but hemp is incredibly easy to grow making it a smart sustainable choice for those trying to conserve the earth's resources. Uppers Canvas upper for durability and comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand tab on the side seam and brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth or use a brush to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
